summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of PetPal Romania animal matching and foster app. All 24 features tested successfully with 100% pass rate. This is a frontend-only prototype with MOCKED data - no backend APIs.

backend_issues.note: No backend - all data is mocked in frontend (src/data/mockData.js)

issues: App design is well-executed with warm cream backgrounds, deep green for trust, sage primary actions, and clay for foster urgency as specified

bottom_tab_navigation.details: All 4 tabs (Matches, Foster, Messages, Profile) switch correctly

matches_tab.animal_selector_dropdown: PASS - Opens and allows switching between Max and Bella
matches_tab.match_card_display: PASS - Shows photo, name, breed, badges, compatibility score
matches_tab.like_button: PASS - Triggers match success modal for Luna (hasLikedBack=true)
matches_tab.verified_mate_locked: PASS - Shows locked state with checklist when selected
matches_tab.details_button: PASS - Opens match detail screen with back navigation

foster_tab.find_section: PASS - Shows Bruno, Iris, Rex foster case cards
foster_tab.view_case: PASS - Opens detail screen with full case info
foster_tab.my_requests: PASS - Shows application cards (Bruno-Accepted, Iris-In Review)
foster_tab.manage_section: PASS - Shows rescuer access request flow
foster_tab.demo_preview: PASS - Shows demo banner and manage dashboard

messages_tab.grouped_conversations: PASS - Shows Matches and Foster sections
messages_tab.message_send: PASS - Can type and send messages
messages_tab.safety_menu: PASS - Opens via MoreVertical with View context/Report/Block options

profile_tab.my_animals: PASS - Shows Max and Bella cards
profile_tab.verification_section: PASS - Accessible with all verification statuses

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
App uses framer-motion for smooth swipe gestures on match cards
Tailwind CSS styling is consistent with design requirements
Context API (AppContext.js) properly manages global state
Mock data structure is well-organized in mockData.js
Translations properly implemented for EN/RO in translations.js
test_credentials: No authentication required - mock data only
seed_data_creation: All data is mocked in src/data/mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a frontend-only prototype with all data mocked. No backend APIs exist. All 24 features from the requirements have been tested and pass. The app uses React with Tailwind CSS, framer-motion for animations, and lucide-react for icons. The app renders inside a phone frame container (max-w-430px).

mocked_apis_list: demoAnimals - Max and Bella animal profiles
demoMatchCandidates - Luna, Nora, Milo, Rocky match candidates
demoFosterCases - Bruno, Iris, Rex foster cases

features_tested: Bottom tab navigation - all 4 tabs switch correctly
Matches tab: Animal selector dropdown works
Matches tab: Mode selector (Play/Social/Verified Mate) switching works
Matches tab: Match card displays with photo, name, breed, badges
Matches tab: Like button works and triggers match success for Luna
Matches tab: Pass button advances to next card
Matches tab: Verified Mate locked state shows when selected
Matches tab: Filter chips (Dogs/Cats) filter cards correctly
Matches tab: Details button opens match detail screen with back navigation
Foster tab: Find section shows foster case cards (Bruno, Iris, Rex)
Foster tab: Section tabs (Find/My Requests/Manage) work
Foster tab: View case opens detail screen
Foster tab: My Requests shows application cards
Foster tab: Manage section shows rescuer access request flow
Foster tab: Demo preview mode works
Messages tab: Shows grouped conversations (Matches + Foster sections)
Messages tab: Filter tabs (All/Matches/Foster) work
Messages tab: Clicking a conversation opens thread with context header
Messages tab: Can type and send a message
Messages tab: Safety menu opens via MoreVertical button
Profile tab: User summary displays correctly (Alex, Bucharest/Sector 3)
Profile tab: My Animals shows Max and Bella cards
Profile tab: Verification section is accessible
Profile tab: Language toggle switches between EN/RO
